use tree_sitter::{Parser, Query, QueryCursor};

fn find_all_functions(query: &Query, cursor: &mut QueryCursor, tree: &tree_sitter::Tree, source: &str) -> Vec<String> {
    let matches = cursor.matches(query, tree.root_node(), source.as_bytes());
    let captures: Vec<_> = matches
        .flat_map(|m| m.captures.iter().cloned())
        .collect();

    let mut results = Vec::new();
    for capture in captures {
        let node = capture.node;
        let text = &source[node.start_byte()..node.end_byte()];
        let name = text.to_string();
        if name.starts_with("test_") {
            results.push(name);
        }
    }
    results
}

fn find_matching_nodes(query: &Query, cursor: &mut QueryCursor, tree: &tree_sitter::Tree, source: &str) -> Vec<String> {
    let all_captures: Vec<_> = cursor
        .matches(query, tree.root_node(), source.as_bytes())
        .flat_map(|m| m.captures.to_vec())
        .collect();

    let mut names = Vec::new();
    for capture in &all_captures {
        let text = &source[capture.node.start_byte()..capture.node.end_byte()];
        if text.len() > 3 {
            names.push(text.to_string());
        }
    }
    names
}
